# Attribution

This directory is a standalone, manually maintained, read-only adaptation of the
SearchTimeline-related portions of Bird v0.8.0 by Peter Steinberger. Bird was released under
the MIT License; its license is preserved in `LICENSE`.

The `last30days-skill` project was inspected as a useful example of embedding Bird's search
client, but this service does not import, install, modify, track, or depend on that project.

Only cookie-authenticated tweet search is retained. Browser-cookie discovery and every
posting, liking, reposting, following, bookmarking, deleting, upload, profile, and timeline
operation are intentionally absent.
